name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan represents a fundamental shift in the project's methodology. It introduces new baseline implementations (cILC/Wiener Filter) at the start, changes the training strategy (incorporating OOD stress testing and feature attribution), and transitions the core model architecture from a deterministic SR-DAE to a Conditional Diffusion Model (CDM). Because the new plan redefines the data pipeline, model architecture, and validation strategy, the previous execution steps are no longer applicable or sufficient to meet the new requirements. Therefore, the project must restart from the beginning.
